name: REX HTF weekly range-location veto alpha
description: Weak but usable REX veto alpha: trade deterministic REX base side only when weekly higher-timeframe return is not deeply negative and the 144-bar range location is not too upper-stretched. Intended as an alpha feature / context filter, not a standalone live strategy.

entry_logic.equivalent_feature_note: range_pos is the same short-range location surface as rex_144_range_pos in this REX feature builder.

evidence: All train/test/eval splits are positive with reduced strict MDD versus raw REX. However CAGR/MDD<3 and eval trade count/p-value are weak, so use as weak alpha feature or portfolio sleeve candidate rather than standalone live-grade strategy.
leakage_guard: Thresholds formed from train quantiles; diagnostic ranking used train+test only for the TTE table and eval remained holdout. Features are signal-time/past-only; entry occurs after signal.

usage_recipe.as_alpha_feature: Emit 1 when fixed REX event is active and both keep gates pass, else 0. Use as weak positive alpha / veto context.
usage_recipe.as_trade_rule: Only trade REX base side when gates pass; do not use standalone live without portfolio/risk overlay.
usage_recipe.promotion_status: candidate; useful but below live-grade target CAGR/strictMDD>=3 across statistically meaningful splits.
